criteria.name: PCA with scree plot, loadings table, biplot/score plot
criteria.evidence: pca_station_loadings() in src/pea_met_network/redundancy.py uses sklearn PCA with z-score normalization and produces station×component loadings DataFrame. Notebook cell 14 prints 'PCA Loadings' table. Cell 15 generates scree plot (pca_scree.png) with explained variance ratios. Cell 16 generates biplot (pca_biplot.png) with PC1/PC2 axes and station labels. All three artifacts verified.

criteria.name: Clustering with dendrogram or cluster assignment table with distance comparison
criteria.evidence: Notebook cell 18 generates hierarchical clustering dendrogram (clustering_dendrogram.png) using scipy linkage with average method on 1-correlation distance. Cell 19 prints 'Cluster assignments:' via cluster_station_order() (sklearn AgglomerativeClustering) and 'Pairwise distance matrix:' via pairwise_station_correlation(). Both outputs verified in test.

criteria.name: All cells execute top-to-bottom without errors
criteria.evidence: Full test suite passes: 15/15 tests in test_analysis_notebook.py, full suite 93 pass + 2 skip. No error outputs in any notebook cell.

summary: Phase 10b (PCA + Clustering) criteria fully satisfied. PCA implementation uses real sklearn decomposition with z-score normalization, producing loadings table, scree plot, and biplot. Clustering uses scipy hierarchical linkage and sklearn AgglomerativeClustering, producing dendrogram, cluster assignments, and pairwise distance matrix. All cells execute cleanly and the full test suite passes.
